title: Proxy Announcer
description: A simple and configurable proxy announcement plugin for Bungeecord and Velocity
body:
A simple and configurable proxy announcement plugin for Bungeecord and Velocity win customizable messages and much more coming soon...
​

### Commands:​
- /announce <message> - Announce a message globally to all servers.
- /announceserver <server> <message> - Announce a message to a specific server.

### Coming Soon
- Auto Broadcaster
